column15: This spreadsheet was created in partnership with the PvM Encyclopedia Discord.
If you need help using this calculator, don't hesitate to ask in the PvME Discord server!

This spreadsheet does not automatically account for defence level drains from things like gstaff or swh. Manually enter these using the "Additional def drain" field (K16). Bear in mind some monsters are immune to defence level drains e.g Araxxor.
These drains will only last a short duration on bosses that rapidly regenerate their defence levels (e.g Nex, Vorago). Other bosses have no such regeneration so you can keep applying drains (bar quake) until they reach level 0 defence.
